message:
feat(providers): case-insensitive provider matching, Kimi Code OAuth, and credential resolution overhaul

Overhauls the provider identity system to use case-insensitive matching
with canonical_provider_id() normalization throughout the codebase,
adds Kimi Code as a new OAuth-authenticated provider, and refactors
credential resolution to support alias-aware lookups.

## Case-Insensitive Provider Matching

### Core (src/app.rs, src/rpc.rs)
- Add provider_ids_match() helper that resolves both sides through
  canonical_provider_id() before comparing case-insensitively
- Replace all exact string equality provider comparisons with
  provider_ids_match() across model selection, session restore, RPC
  model lookup, and scoped model cycling
- Make model ID comparisons case-insensitive with eq_ignore_ascii_case()
- Expand default_model_from_available() from 3 entries to 20+ covering
  all supported providers (bedrock, azure, codex, vertex, copilot,
  openrouter, xai, groq, cerebras, minimax, huggingface, etc.)

### Model Registry (src/models.rs)
- Add normalized_registry_key() that produces canonical lowercase
  (provider, model_id) tuples for deduplication
- Use case-insensitive matching in find_by_id() and merge_entries()
- Fix legacy model catalog end-marker search to scope from object_start
  rather than searching the entire file (prevents mismatch with nested
  "} as const;" patterns)
- Sort autocomplete candidates case-insensitively
- Add tests verifying legacy provider extraction, built-in registry
  completeness, and display name preservation

### Interactive (src/interactive/commands.rs, model_selector_ui.rs)
- Rewrite model_entry_matches() to canonicalize providers before compare
- Add split_provider_model_spec() and provider_ids_match() helpers
- Add extension_oauth_config_for_provider() with canonical-aware lookup
- Refactor save_provider_credential() and remove_provider_credentials()
  to use remove_provider_aliases() for clean credential replacement
- Fix should_show_startup_oauth_hint() to check all known providers
  (not just the 3 priority ones) before showing the hint
- Add normalize_model_key() and unique_model_count() for case-insensitive
  model deduplication in the selector overlay
- Resolve API key during model switch so the agent receives credentials
  immediately when switching to a configured provider
- Add comprehensive tests for model selector credential flow

## Kimi Code OAuth (RFC 8628 Device Flow)

### Auth (src/auth.rs)
- Add Kimi Code OAuth constants (client ID, host, device authorization
  and token endpoints, share directory)
- Implement start_kimi_code_device_flow() and poll_kimi_code_device_flow()
  using RFC 8628 device authorization grant
- Generalize PendingLoginKind::DeviceFlow from Copilot-specific to
  provider-agnostic (src/interactive/state.rs)

### Anthropic Provider Adapter (src/providers/anthropic.rs)
- Add Kimi Code support via the Anthropic messages adapter: detect
  kimi-for-coding provider, set kimi_share_dir device ID, and inject
  X-Msh-* headers (Platform, Version, Device-Name, Device-Model,
  Os-Version, Device-Id) with ASCII sanitization
- Add is_anthropic_bearer_token() to detect external Claude Code
  credentials (non sk-ant- prefixed tokens) and route them through
  Bearer Authorization instead of X-API-Key
- Add with_provider_name() to AnthropicProvider for correct event
  attribution when reused by Kimi
- Add kimi_device_id() with persistent storage under ~/.kimi/ and
  legacy fallback under ~/.pi/agent/

### Provider Routing (src/providers/mod.rs)
- Accept "azure-openai-responses" as provider name and API type for
  Azure OpenAI routing, enabling legacy model catalog entries
- Extract resolve_copilot_token() helper with inline key > env var
  fallback, replacing inline env::var chain
- Pass with_provider_name() when creating Anthropic provider instances
- Add tests for Azure legacy alias routing and copilot token resolution

### OpenAI Codex (src/providers/openai_responses.rs)
- Add bearer_token_from_authorization_header() parser for extracting
  tokens from custom Authorization headers passed via model config
- Allow Codex mode headers (chatgpt-account-id, OpenAI-Beta, session_id)
  to work with both resolved API keys and Authorization header overrides
- Add tests for bearer token parser and Codex mode with Authorization
  header override

### Provider Metadata (src/provider_metadata.rs)
- Add "kimi-code" alias for kimi-for-coding provider

## Credential Resolution (src/auth.rs)
- Add credential_for_provider() that checks exact key, case-insensitive
  key, canonical ID, and all aliases — replacing scattered manual lookups
- Simplify api_key() and credential_status() to delegate to the new
  unified credential_for_provider() method
- Add remove_provider_aliases() for cleaning up all credential entries
  associated with a provider (canonical + aliases, case-insensitive)

## Test & Fixture Updates
- Update extension test fixtures from .js to .native.json format
  (src/resources.rs)
- Add case-variant model deduplication test (tests/tui_state.rs)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
